articles.headline: AI Boom Sparks Global Chip Shortage and Price Surge: Apple Hikes MacBook and iPad Prices
articles.summary: Apple increased prices for Macs and iPads by up to $500 due to a memory chip shortage driven by AI demand, directly impacting consumer costs and corporate hardware procurement budgets. This signals rising infrastructure costs for businesses adopting AI tools and potential supply chain delays for tech hardware.

articles.headline: Trump Administration Lifts Export Controls on Anthropic's Most Powerful AI Models
articles.summary: The US government ended a weeks-long ban on Anthropic's Claude chatbot and powerful AI models, easing cybersecurity-related restrictions. This change allows businesses to immediately deploy advanced AI tools for enterprise productivity, reducing compliance barriers for cross-border AI adoption.

articles.headline: Tesla's Global Sales Shot Up 25% in Q2, Signaling Turnaround for EV Maker
articles.summary: Tesla reported a 25% surge in global sales, reversing two years of annual declines and lifting investor sentiment in the EV sector. This market shift affects supply chain planning for battery and component suppliers while signaling renewed competitiveness for EV fleet buyers.
